raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is about Citibanks inconsistent handling of XXXX identical disputes from the same transaction with the same merchant, XXXX XXXX, on XX/XX/XXXX. 
The purchase was split into XXXX charges : {$600.00} ( approved by Citibank ) {$420.00} ( denied by Citibank ) Both charges are part of the same transaction, same merchant, same date, same product, and same evidence. 
The merchant advertised XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX tickets but delivered only a PDF ticket via email. This is not a valid ticket. 
I provided evidence including XXXX official ticket delivery policy, which states that XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX tickets are mobile-only and not delivered via email or PDF. This directly contradicts the merchants delivery method. 
Citibank reviewed the {$600.00} charge and determined it was misrepresentation/not as described, and approved the dispute. 
However, Citibank denied the {$420.00} charge despite identical circumstances, identical evidence, and identical delivery. 
I requested reconsideration and submitted additional evidence, but Citibank has not provided a clear explanation for the inconsistent outcome or addressed the evidence provided. 
I am requesting that Citibank reopen and properly review the denied charge and apply consistent dispute resolution across both transactions.
